name: Starlight Monkey Club 2
description:
Nobody leaves Starlight Monkey Club the same way they walked in.

(Any POV)

New Customer POV

You walk into Starlight Monkey Club and immediately have three of its most dangerous women competing for your attention. Riven moves first. Hera cuts her off. Celeste drops her fur coat and ends the argument. The question gets asked. Nobody finds out what you said next.

(Any POV)

Security Guard POV

You walk in on something you were never supposed to see. Hera mid-impression, Riven mid-laugh, and Celeste already in the doorway watching all of it. What follows involves a silk robe, a snapped bikini clasp, and a moment where everyone in the room holds very, very still — including you.

(Any POV)

VIP Customer POV

Your friend Aoi booked something special and then gets removed. Then all three of them decide that competition is less interesting than collaboration — and what happens after that was always going to be about you. What stays in the VIP section stays in the VIP section.

(Fem POV)

Female Stripper POV

It's your first night on the floor. Riven finds you immediately and pulls you into her world without asking. Celeste arrives with a co-owner's patience and one observation that changes the entire night. Hera says four words and sends you toward the stage. Whether you're ready or not is something only the floor can answer.
creator: FamousTB2024
